scripts.db-create: bun run db-start && bunx drizzle-kit generate --config "db/drizzle.config.ts" && bunx drizzle-kit push --config "db/drizzle.config.ts"
scripts.db-reset: docker rm -f my_earth_db || true && bun run db-create && bun run db-seed
scripts.db-studio: bun run db-start && bunx drizzle-kit studio --config "db/drizzle.config.ts"
